message:
fix(node): replace assert!(false, ...) with panic!() in test match arms

Replaces assert!(false, msg) with panic!(msg) across 13 modules
for clearer test failure semantics. assert!(false, ...) is
misleading — it looks like a conditional assertion but always
fails. panic!() communicates intent directly: "this code path
should never be reached."

Affected modules: fencing, lifecycle, n_version_oracle,
policy_checkpoint, rollout_state, supervision, fork_detection,
key_role_separation, hardening_state_machine, idempotency_store,
nversion_oracle, safe_mode, counterfactual_replay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
